action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the All menu filter field
rationale: To reach the "Expense Lines" module quickly, use the All menu filter which is already focused to search directly for the module by name.

action_text: Type "Cost" into the All menu filter field
rationale: If searching by the exact module name doesn’t surface results, searching by the application name "Cost" should reveal the "Expense Lines" module under it.

action_text: Type "Expense" into the All menu filter field
rationale: Broader search term may list multiple expense-related modules, including "Expense Lines", allowing selection from results.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the global Search field
rationale: As an alternate path, use the global Search box to locate the "Expense Lines" module or related list, in case the All menu filter is insufficient.

action_text: Collapse the "Self-Service" section in the All menu
rationale: Reduce clutter in the All menu by collapsing the expanded "Self-Service" section so other applications like "Cost" are easier to spot if scrolling becomes necessary.
